approvalSource: Steve approved continuing the Foundation gold-capture sprint after carding/stabbing the discussed work.
notes: Approved as the first gold-capture sprint card. Build the conversation archive model and generated manifest without reading local-only private memory, uploading chats, running models, or mutating external/source systems.

notNext: No MEMORY-004 lessons/IP extraction before the archive model closes.
